_comments.openai_api_key: Your OpenAI API key. Required when using the hosted OpenAI service. Leave as an empty string or omit when using a local vLLM server.
_comments.base_url: Base URL of an OpenAI-compatible API endpoint, including the /v1 suffix. Set this to point at a local vLLM server, e.g. 'http://192.168.1.50:8000/v1'. Leave as an empty string (or omit) to use the hosted OpenAI API.
_comments.model: Model name understood by the server. For OpenAI: gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, etc. For vLLM: the Hugging Face model ID used when the server was started, e.g. 'mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2'.
_comments.repositories: List of local git repos to monitor. name = display label, path = absolute path on disk
_comments.schedule_minutes: How often to check for new commits (in minutes). Set to 0 to run once and exit.
_comments.lookback_commits: Max number of recent commits to process on first run per repo
_comments.dashboard_port: Local port for the web dashboard
